# Environment Variables Test - Verify Environment Configuration
# Demonstrates: env variable setting, conditional behavior, variable verification

# Set and verify environment variables
env TEST_MODE=true
exec printenv TEST_MODE
stdout "true"

# Set multiple variables
env DEBUG_LEVEL=verbose
env LOG_FORMAT=json
exec printenv DEBUG_LEVEL
stdout "verbose"

exec printenv LOG_FORMAT
stdout "json"

# Test conditional behavior based on environment
env SKIP_EXPENSIVE_TEST=false
exec sh -c 'if [ "$SKIP_EXPENSIVE_TEST" = "true" ]; then echo "Skipped"; else echo "Running"; fi'
stdout "Running"
! stdout "Skipped"

# Override environment variable
env OPTION=new_value
exec printenv OPTION
stdout "new_value"

# Verify variables persist across commands in same test
env PERSISTENT_VAR=original
exec sh -c 'echo "Value: $PERSISTENT_VAR"'
stdout "Value: original"
